The new My Dress-Up Darling Marin Kitagawa Taito figure puts the character in her Halloween bunny girl costume.

text:

Valve opened a registration list to pre-order and buy a Steam Machine PC model, with two variants available at launch.

Even more Sonic & Friends Sanrio character merchandise will show up next month like purses, figures, and towels.

text:
Vtuber Ironmouse Teases 3D Model and 3D Streams
Vtuber Ironmouse announced she's turning a room in her house into an office and 3D room and teased a 3D model and streams.

The next Honkai: Nexus Anima beta test is the Evolution PC and Android and iOS mobile one that starts next month.

text:
First New Hunter x Hunter Manga Chapter Since 2024 Debuts
The 411th chapter is set to appear in the 2026 31st issue of Weekly Shonen Jump.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: Devil May Cry 5 Devil Hunter Edition Impresses on Switch 2
Devil May Cry 5 Devil Hunter Edition on Switch 2 is an impressive port that still feels fresh even considering its age.

text:
A Starlit Darkness Manga Approaches Relationships Very Differently From Cherry Magic
A Starlit Darkness is the new manga from the Cherry Magic creator, and it depicts a very different relationship dynamic.
